description: Spells channeling raw elemental forces — fire, ice, lightning, wind, and storm — into devastating displays of power.
abilities: Bedazzle

Summoning four prismatic bolts that sparkle brilliantly, each directed at any visible target. Each bolt deals minor damage on impact, and if all four strike a single creature, the target becomes mesmerized, frozen in dazzled bewilderment.
Burn

Blowing hot air that curls into scorching winds around a nearby creature or object, making it deeply uncomfortable. At greater power, the caster overcharges the heat and ignites the target in flame, dealing minor damage and setting it ablaze.
Clap

Clapping your hands to unleash a thunderous wave of force in the direction you face. The wave strikes several nearby creatures for moderate damage, and anything horse-sized or smaller is also knocked to the ground.
Cloudcall

Swirling the hands through the air to produce a thick fog centered on the caster. The fog rolls out rapidly, spilling around corners and down slopes until it blankets the surrounding area. Creatures inside cannot see beyond arm's reach, preventing ranged attacks. The fog disperses after the caster departs or if strong winds blow through.
Fireball

Shaping an orb of fire suspended in the air and sending it streaking toward a visible target, where it explodes on contact and deals significant damage to creatures and objects nearby. The caster can shape the blast to avoid allies. Results vary widely: at best the explosion engulfs all nearby foes for devastating damage, while a poor casting might send the fireball off course into unintended targets -- or detonate it in the caster's own face.
Freeze

Blowing cool air that spirals into freezing winds around a nearby creature or object, chilling it to the bone and dealing minor damage. Small fires gutter and die in the cold. At greater power, the caster encases a lesser foe or object entirely in ice, immobilizing it until the caster departs. A frozen creature cannot move or act, though the ice shatters and frees it if struck.
Gale

Closing the eyes and stirring the air to shape a ferocious gale across an area of any size and shape the caster can see. Inside the gale, dust kicks up and small objects go flying; creatures can only perceive what is immediately nearby. When the wind first erupts, it knocks creatures to the ground and sends them tumbling until they leave the area. Creatures outside the gust cannot force their way in unless they are larger than the area of effect.
Kindle

Rubbing your hands together to ignite any flammable object you can see nearby — textiles, wood, paper, or other combustible material. The spell cannot target creatures directly, but igniting something a creature is wearing or carrying singes them for minor damage.
Last Light

Channeling a blinding beam of focused light through a pointed object — a wand, staff, or sword — at a visible target, dealing significant damage. The beam ignites anything flammable, melts through steel, and sears organic matter. When overloaded, the beam becomes devastating — lethal to lesser foes and ordinary people, and capable of disintegrating the slain to ash. The beam can be deflected by mirrors.
Magic Strike

Channeling a shimmering missile of force through a pointed object — a wand, staff, or sword — and launching it in a straight line at a visible target, dealing minor damage. With additional effort, the missile can be overloaded to deal significant damage and strike unerringly without any chance of missing.
Nature's Wrath

Channeling elemental fury into a massive storm centered on the caster, spanning a vast area. The storm persists as long as the caster maintains concentration, though sustaining it slowly drains their vitality. A calm eye of any size may be chosen. The caster selects the storm's nature each time: lightning, which arcs electricity through conductive objects and lashes all caught within for moderate damage each moment; blizzard, which conjures freezing hail and blinding ice that deals minor damage and reduces visibility to arm's reach; or hurricane, which unleashes winds of terrifying force that uproot trees, collapse weak structures, shatter windows, and hurl creatures and objects through the air for severe damage.
Riverfury

Whispering a magical incantation to a flowing river within range, commanding the waters to gather strength upstream. Moments later a torrent of water surges through, sweeping all creatures caught in its path far downstream and depositing them on shore well beyond sight.
Scintillate

Extending the fingers outward to send a streaking bolt of sparks toward a visible target. On contact, the bolt can explode with crackling energy to deal minor damage, or burst harmlessly as a dazzling firework in any shape and color the caster desires.
Shock

Calling a bolt of lightning from the sky or from the caster's own hands to strike a visible target, dealing significant damage in a deafening blast of thunder. Any metal connected to the target's body turns molten, inflicting additional harm.
Stormcall

Producing a circle of dark, electrically charged clouds somewhere visible in the sky. The storm persists as long as the caster remains in the area. While active, the caster may call upon it to unleash a sudden downpour, produce a deafening crack of thunder that deafens all creatures beneath it, or -- if the caster knows lightning magic -- hurl bolts of chain lightning that arc through multiple foes, dealing significant damage to each target struck.
Thunderous Word

Speaking a chosen word of power that releases a thunderous shockwave in the direction the caster faces, knocking back up to three creatures and dealing moderate damage to each. Affected creatures are briefly dazed and unable to use special abilities on their next action.
Vortex

Creating a howling vortex within a visible body of liquid that persists as long as the caster remains nearby. Any creature touching the vortex is violently sucked in, submerged, and spat out, taking moderate damage.
